title: Audit Specialist
responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: VectorApps is hiring a junior audit specialist to support reviewing financial processes, controls, and compliance activities.
raw_text: Vacancy V077: Audit Specialist at VectorApps. Location: Lviv. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 0.5 years. Required skills: audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment, ifrs, gaap. Optional skills: power bi, sox. Responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation.
